candidates.why: A single explicit operating D&A line appears at the same level as Production expenses and other operating expense buckets, so it does not appear embedded within the selected COGS rows. In an upstream oil and gas income statement, depletion/depreciation is typically primarily tied to production/cost of sales.

variables.notes: OK. Selected the standalone operating D&A row for later addition to COGS. It appears separate from the selected COGS rows rather than a subcomponent of them.

candidates.why: This is the only explicit D&A row above the financial section, but it is a single consolidated operating D&A line and not specifically SG&A-related. Adding it to XSGA as well would risk double counting if it is already being captured under COGS_DA.

variables.notes: No separate SG&A-specific D&A row is shown. To avoid double counting, the single consolidated operating D&A line is not added to XSGA_DA.
